component.name: Project Notes
component.summary: Project management and meeting notes application

description.p: Project Notes is a desktop application for project management that helps you track notes, meeting minutes, risks, issues, action items, contacts, and clients. It features a Python plugin system for extensibility and integrates with tools like Outlook and MS Office.
Visit www.projectnotespro.com to download the companion mobile application and to manage your online data storage subscription.
